EN.title: API endpoints
EN.description: Complete VaultWares REST API endpoint reference
EN.body:
## Overview

The VaultWares REST API provides programmatic access to all management functions. Use it to automate device management, enforce policies, manage users, query audit logs, and manage cryptographic keys and certificates.

**Base URL**: `https://api.vaultwares.com/v1`

All requests must be authenticated. See the [Authentication guide](/api-reference/authentication) for details.

## Common conventions

- All request and response bodies are JSON (`Content-Type: application/json`)
- Timestamps are ISO 8601 format (`2024-11-15T14:30:00Z`)
- Pagination uses `limit` and `cursor` parameters
- Errors follow a consistent `{"error": {"code": "...", "message": "...", "type": "..."}}` format

## Devices

### List devices

```http
GET /v1/devices
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `type` | string | Filter by device type: `vaultdrive`, `vaulthsm`, `vaultscan`, `vaultgate` |
| `status` | string | Filter by status: `online`, `offline`, `locked`, `error` |
| `user_id` | string | Filter by assigned user |
| `limit` | integer | Results per page (default: 20, max: 100) |
| `cursor` | string | Pagination cursor from previous response |

```bash
curl https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -G \
  --data-urlencode "type=vaultdrive" \
  --data-urlencode "status=online" \
  --data-urlencode "limit=50"
```

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "dev_VD-ENT-00247",
      "type": "vaultdrive",
      "model": "VaultDrive Enterprise",
      "serial": "VD-ENT-00247",
      "firmware_version": "3.2.0",
      "status": "online",
      "assigned_to": "user_alice123",
      "last_seen": "2024-11-15T14:29:55Z",
      "policy": "corporate-standard",
      "encrypted": true,
      "capacity_gb": 1024
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "cursor": "cursor_abc123",
    "has_more": true,
    "total": 247
  }
}
```

### Get a device

```http
GET /v1/devices/{device_id}
```

### Update a device

```http
PATCH /v1/devices/{device_id}
```

```bash
curl -X PATCH https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247 \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "policy": "high-security",
    "assigned_to": "user_bob456",
    "metadata": {"department": "Finance", "asset_tag": "IT-00247"}
  }'
```

### Lock / unlock a device

```bash
# Lock device
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247/lock \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"reason": "Suspected loss"}'

# Unlock device
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247/unlock \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef"
```

### Crypto-erase a device

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247/crypto-erase \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{
    "confirm": true,
    "reason": "GDPR right-to-erasure request",
    "audit_reference": "DSR-2024-1115-001"
  }'
```

<Warning>
  The `crypto-erase` endpoint is irreversible. All data on the device is permanently destroyed by wiping the encryption key.
</Warning>

## Policies

### List policies

```http
GET /v1/policies
```

### Create a policy

```http
POST /v1/policies
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/policies \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "high-security",
    "description": "Policy for devices handling sensitive data",
    "settings": {
      "min_password_length": 16,
      "require_2fa": true,
      "auto_lock_minutes": 5,
      "max_failed_attempts": 5,
      "audit_logging": "all",
      "require_mfa_for_unlock": true
    }
  }'
```

### Deploy policy to devices

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/policies/pol_abc123/deploy \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"device_ids": ["dev_VD-ENT-00247", "dev_VD-ENT-00248"], "force": false}'
```

## Users

### List users

```http
GET /v1/users
```

### Create a user

```http
POST /v1/users
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/users \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "charlie@example.com",
    "first_name": "Charlie",
    "last_name": "Brown",
    "roles": ["StandardUser"],
    "department": "Engineering",
    "mfa_required": true,
    "send_welcome_email": true
  }'
```

```json
{
  "id": "user_charlie789",
  "email": "charlie@example.com",
  "first_name": "Charlie",
  "last_name": "Brown",
  "status": "active",
  "roles": ["StandardUser"],
  "mfa_enrolled": false,
  "created_at": "2024-11-15T14:30:00Z"
}
```

### Revoke all user sessions

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/users/user_charlie789/revoke-sessions \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"reason": "Security incident"}'
```

## Audit logs

### Query audit logs

```http
GET /v1/audit
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `start` | ISO 8601 | Start of time range |
| `end` | ISO 8601 | End of time range |
| `user_id` | string | Filter by user |
| `device_id` | string | Filter by device |
| `event_type` | string | Filter by event type |
| `limit` | integer | Results per page (max: 1000) |

```bash
curl https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/audit \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -G \
  --data-urlencode "start=2024-11-15T00:00:00Z" \
  --data-urlencode "end=2024-11-15T23:59:59Z" \
  --data-urlencode "event_type=auth_failure" \
  --data-urlencode "limit=100"
```

## Keys

### List keys

```http
GET /v1/keys
```

### Generate a key

```http
POST /v1/keys
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/keys \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "label": "App-Signing-Key-v2",
    "type": "ecc",
    "curve": "P-256",
    "usage": ["sign", "verify"],
    "extractable": false,
    "hsm": "production-hsm"
  }'
```

### Rotate a key

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/keys/key_abc123/rotate \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"keep_old_version": true, "deprecate_old_after_days": 90}'
```

## Certificates

### List certificates

```http
GET /v1/certificates
```

### Issue a certificate

```http
POST /v1/certificates
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/certificates \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "common_name": "api.example.com",
    "sans": ["api.example.com", "api-v2.example.com"],
    "key_label": "TLS-API-Key",
    "validity_days": 365,
    "ca": "internal-ca"
  }'
```

## Error responses

| HTTP Status | Error code | Description |
|---|---|---|
| 400 | `invalid_request` | Missing or malformed request parameter |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | API key is invalid or revoked |
| 403 | `insufficient_permissions` | API key lacks required permission |
| 404 | `not_found` | Requested resource does not exist |
| 409 | `conflict` | Resource already exists or state conflict |
| 422 | `validation_error` | Request body failed validation |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Too many requests |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error â€” contact support |

## Next steps

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Authentication" icon="key" href="/api-reference/authentication">
    API keys, OAuth 2.0, and rate limits
  </Card>
  <Card title="Webhooks" icon="webhook" href="/api-reference/webhooks">
    Real-time event notifications
  </Card>
  <Card title="SDKs" icon="book-code" href="/api-reference/sdk">
    Official client libraries
  </Card>
  <Card title="Daily operations" icon="calendar" href="/guides/daily-operations">
    Automate routine tasks with the API
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

QC.body:
## AperÃ§u

L'API REST de VaultWares fournit un accÃ¨s programmatique Ã  toutes les fonctions de gestion. Utilisez-la pour automatiser la gestion des appareils, appliquer des politiques, gÃ©rer les utilisateurs, interroger les journaux d'audit et gÃ©rer les clÃ©s cryptographiques et les certificats.

**URL de base**: `https://api.vaultwares.com/v1`

Toutes les requÃªtes doivent Ãªtre authentifiÃ©es. Consultez le [guide d'authentification](/api-reference/authentication) pour plus de dÃ©tails.

## Conventions courantes

- Tous les corps de requÃªte et de rÃ©ponse sont au format JSON (`Content-Type: application/json`)
- Les horodatages sont au format ISO 8601 (`2024-11-15T14:30:00Z`)
- La pagination utilise les paramÃ¨tres `limit` et `cursor`
- Les erreurs suivent un format cohÃ©rent de `{"error": {"code": "...", "message": "...", "type": "..."}}`

## Appareils

### Lister les appareils

```http
GET /v1/devices
```

| ParamÃ¨tre | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `type` | string | Filtrer par type d'appareil : `vaultdrive`, `vaulthsm`, `vaultscan`, `vaultgate` |
| `status` | string | Filtrer par statut : `online`, `offline`, `locked`, `error` |
| `user_id` | string | Filtrer par utilisateur assignÃ© |
| `limit` | integer | RÃ©sultats par page (par dÃ©faut : 20, max : 100) |
| `cursor` | string | Curseur de pagination de la rÃ©ponse prÃ©cÃ©dente |

```bash
curl https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -G \
  --data-urlencode "type=vaultdrive" \
  --data-urlencode "status=online" \
  --data-urlencode "limit=50"
```

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "dev_VD-ENT-00247",
      "type": "vaultdrive",
      "model": "VaultDrive Enterprise",
      "serial": "VD-ENT-00247",
      "firmware_version": "3.2.0",
      "status": "online",
      "assigned_to": "user_alice123",
      "last_seen": "2024-11-15T14:29:55Z",
      "policy": "corporate-standard",
      "encrypted": true,
      "capacity_gb": 1024
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "cursor": "cursor_abc123",
    "has_more": true,
    "total": 247
  }
}
```

### RÃ©cupÃ©rer un appareil

```http
GET /v1/devices/{device_id}
```

### Mettre Ã  jour un appareil

```http
PATCH /v1/devices/{device_id}
```

```bash
curl -X PATCH https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247 \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "policy": "high-security",
    "assigned_to": "user_bob456",
    "metadata": {"department": "Finance", "asset_tag": "IT-00247"}
  }'
```

### Verrouiller / dÃ©verrouiller un appareil

```bash
# Lock device
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247/lock \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"reason": "Suspected loss"}'

# Unlock device
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247/unlock \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef"
```

### Effacer cryptographiquement un appareil

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/devices/dev_VD-ENT-00247/crypto-erase \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{
    "confirm": true,
    "reason": "GDPR right-to-erasure request",
    "audit_reference": "DSR-2024-1115-001"
  }'
```

<Warning>
  Le point de terminaison `crypto-erase` est irrÃ©versible. Toutes les donnÃ©es sur l'appareil sont dÃ©truites de faÃ§on permanente en effaÃ§ant la clÃ© de chiffrement.
</Warning>

## Politiques

### Lister les politiques

```http
GET /v1/policies
```

### CrÃ©er une politique

```http
POST /v1/policies
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/policies \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "high-security",
    "description": "Policy for devices handling sensitive data",
    "settings": {
      "min_password_length": 16,
      "require_2fa": true,
      "auto_lock_minutes": 5,
      "max_failed_attempts": 5,
      "audit_logging": "all",
      "require_mfa_for_unlock": true
    }
  }'
```

### DÃ©ployer une politique sur les appareils

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/policies/pol_abc123/deploy \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"device_ids": ["dev_VD-ENT-00247", "dev_VD-ENT-00248"], "force": false}'
```

## Utilisateurs

### Lister les utilisateurs

```http
GET /v1/users
```

### CrÃ©er un utilisateur

```http
POST /v1/users
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/users \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "charlie@example.com",
    "first_name": "Charlie",
    "last_name": "Brown",
    "roles": ["StandardUser"],
    "department": "Engineering",
    "mfa_required": true,
    "send_welcome_email": true
  }'
```

```json
{
  "id": "user_charlie789",
  "email": "charlie@example.com",
  "first_name": "Charlie",
  "last_name": "Brown",
  "status": "active",
  "roles": ["StandardUser"],
  "mfa_enrolled": false,
  "created_at": "2024-11-15T14:30:00Z"
}
```

### RÃ©voquer toutes les sessions utilisateur

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/users/user_charlie789/revoke-sessions \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"reason": "Security incident"}'
```

## Journaux d'audit

### Interroger les journaux d'audit

```http
GET /v1/audit
```

| ParamÃ¨tre | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `start` | ISO 8601 | DÃ©but de la plage de temps |
| `end` | ISO 8601 | Fin de la plage de temps |
| `user_id` | string | Filtrer par utilisateur |
| `device_id` | string | Filtrer par appareil |
| `event_type` | string | Filtrer par type d'Ã©vÃ©nement |
| `limit` | integer | RÃ©sultats par page (max : 1000) |

```bash
curl https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/audit \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -G \
  --data-urlencode "start=2024-11-15T00:00:00Z" \
  --data-urlencode "end=2024-11-15T23:59:59Z" \
  --data-urlencode "event_type=auth_failure" \
  --data-urlencode "limit=100"
```

## ClÃ©s

### Lister les clÃ©s

```http
GET /v1/keys
```

### GÃ©nÃ©rer une clÃ©

```http
POST /v1/keys
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/keys \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "label": "App-Signing-Key-v2",
    "type": "ecc",
    "curve": "P-256",
    "usage": ["sign", "verify"],
    "extractable": false,
    "hsm": "production-hsm"
  }'
```

### Rotationner une clÃ©

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/keys/key_abc123/rotate \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -d '{"keep_old_version": true, "deprecate_old_after_days": 90}'
```

## Certificats

### Lister les certificats

```http
GET /v1/certificates
```

### Ã‰mettre un certificat

```http
POST /v1/certificates
```

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.vaultwares.com/v1/certificates \
  -H "X-API-Key: vw_live_1234567890abcdef" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "common_name": "api.example.com",
    "sans": ["api.example.com", "api-v2.example.com"],
    "key_label": "TLS-API-Key",
    "validity_days": 365,
    "ca": "internal-ca"
  }'
```

## RÃ©ponses d'erreur

| HTTP Status | Error code | Description |
|---|---|---|
| 400 | `invalid_request` | ParamÃ¨tre de requÃªte manquant ou mal formÃ© |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | La clÃ© API est invalide ou rÃ©voquÃ©e |
| 403 | `insufficient_permissions` | La clÃ© API ne possÃ¨de pas la permission requise |
| 404 | `not_found` | La ressource demandÃ©e n'existe pas |
| 409 | `conflict` | La ressource existe dÃ©jÃ  ou conflit d'Ã©tat |
| 422 | `validation_error` | Le corps de la requÃªte a Ã©chouÃ© Ã  la validation |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Trop de requÃªtes |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Erreur serveur â€” contactez le support |
